title: Confidentiality of records
doc_html:
§660.  Confidentiality of records

Unless otherwise provided, all medical records, dental records, DNA information, and associated DNA samples submitted to the F.A.C.E.S. Laboratory pursuant to this Chapter shall be confidential.

Acts 2006, No. 227, §1.

§660.  Confidentiality of records
